headline: MSCI acquires First Street to expand physical climate risk modeling
summary: The climate risk tech and data company’s acquisition will help financial institutions embed climate risk calculations “directly into how capital is priced and allocated,” First Street founder Matthew Eby said.

raw.headline: MSCI acquires First Street to expand physical climate risk modeling

headline: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From MSCI Inc.'s Report
summary: MSCI Inc. will release its second-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.
